signals.reasoning: BTC remains strong and trend-supported, but the live geopolitical veto blocks treating the breakout as actionable here.
ETH has strong structure and follow-through, but it is still a breakout chase under a live event brake.
SOL is trend-supported and firm, but it is already extended and not clean enough to override the veto.
LDO is recovering well, but it does not have enough edge over the veto to justify a fresh signal.
PNUT is constructive, but it is still just another rebound continuation name and should remain watch-only.
BOME is too stretched and too noisy to justify a new call under a live geopolitical brake.
AAVE is one of the stronger structures on the board, but it is also already extended and event-sensitive enough to keep on the watchlist only.
RSR does not have enough liquidity or differentiation to justify forcing a signal through a veto regime.
TST remains too extended and crowded to trust for a disciplined fresh entry.
KNEIRO still has incomplete market data in the request snapshot, which is enough by itself to keep it off-limits.
